text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how well that radio recording went!
The director was over the moon!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Could you quiet down a bit? We don't normally
get permission to leave our dorms at this hour.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Oops, sorry, City! Anyway, get some good rest,
all right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, this is wild. I feel so energetic from
finishing work. No way am I getting any sleep
now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Guess I might as well watch some race footage
when I get back to my room.

Later, I hear a rumor that Gold City has started
staying up late.
